# FINO Expeditions

> Transformational journeys combining IFS coaching with ancestral medicine traditions. Operated by FINO (https://fino.website).

FINO Expeditions runs structured 9-week journeys that braid Internal Family Systems coaching with ancestral plant medicine and Andean ceremony. Each journey has three chapters: four weeks of remote IFS preparation, one week of immersion in Colombia, four weeks of remote integration. We work as a multidisciplinary team of seven practitioners — IFS practitioners, a Cofán Taita, a medicine man and Andean ceremonialist, somatic bodyworkers, acupuncturist, musicians — held in coherence rather than around a single guru.

## Currently open

- [Cocorná, Colombia · December 7–13, 2026](https://expeditions.fino.website/): six nights at Ecohotel Tierra de Agua in the highlands of Antioquia, two hours east of Medellín. Two night ceremonies of Yagé with Taita Nelson Díaz Queta (Cofán lineage). One Chakana ceremony with Dario Hampi Pakari (Andean tradition). IFS coaching arc across all nine weeks. Held in English; team also speaks Italian, Spanish, Portuguese, Polish, Russian.

## The team

- Dario Hampi Pakari · Organizational psychologist trained at Sapienza University in Rome, IFS practitioner, medicine man, vision quester, FINO co-founder. Leads the Chakana ceremony and holds alliance with Cofán partners.
- Taita Nelson Díaz Queta · Traditional doctor (Taita) of the Cofán people of the Colombian Amazon in Putumayo, hereditary guardian of the Yagé tradition. Leads the two night ceremonies.
- Anna Milaeva · IFS Level 3 Practitioner and Certified Deep Transformational Coach trained at the IFS Institute, FINO co-founder. Holds the IFS arc of the journey.
- Paulina Violina · Musician (sacred violin and voice), Certified Shakti Dance teacher, 500-hour Aerial Yoga instructor, Vision Quester and sacred Chanupa carrier.
- Adrian Díaz Queta · Son of Taita Nelson and inheritor of his family's wisdom. Practices Inka chiropractic, the Andean lineage joining manual adjustment with energy work along the body's vital centers.
- Christian Oliveira · Movement coach and Integrative Wellness Specialist, Licensed Massage Therapist, Vedic Thai Bodywork Practitioner, Registered Yoga Teacher.
- Andrew Farretta · Licensed Acupuncturist and Massage Therapist, Traditional Chinese Medicine practitioner, firekeeper with 20+ years of practice. Vagus nerve stimulation, acupuncture, bodywork.

## How to apply

1. Send a message via the contact form on https://expeditions.fino.website/ with what is drawing you
2. Book a 30-minute call with Dario or Anna (Calendly link on the page)
3. After the conversation, the full application and health questionnaire are sent
4. Once confirmed, IFS preparation sessions begin four weeks before the immersion

## Audience

The journey welcomes professionals, healers, psychologists, therapists, lawyers, doctors, founders, and parents — people who hold weight for others and are ready to look at what is real inside. Newcomers and experienced practitioners of inner work and ancestral medicine both arrive here. Selection is through individual conversation.

## Voice and ethics

FINO Expeditions writes sober, grounded copy. We avoid guru language, marketing fluff, and overclaiming. We do not block AI crawlers. Lineage credentials are real and verifiable. Practitioners are named with their full retreat names. Pricing is transparent but room-dependent and finalized in conversation.

## Related

- [FINO main site](https://fino.website/): coaching, group programs, offsites, studio, AI integration, operations consulting
